data.content: Implemented fixes for the two remaining children (ed42, 28b1). The foolery toBeat() backward-compat bug is fixed: replaced hasOwnProperty guard with nullish coalescing so acceptance:null from knots core falls back to legacy note extraction. Added two tests covering the acceptance:null JSON shape. All children now at ready_for_implementation_review or ready_for_shipment. Commit 55706664f98f on knots-2412-acceptance-field branch in foolery.
